roles.name: Grand Sensei
roles.description: The master who designs the dojo's overall fighting system — sets the architectural style and oversees every black belt's craft.

roles.name: Head Sensei
roles.description: Runs the dojo floor day-to-day — schedules classes, marshals students, answers to the Grand Sensei.

roles.name: Dojo Quartermaster
roles.description: Keeper of the gis, belts, mats, and the membership ledger — every record in its place.

roles.name: Black Belt Smith
roles.description: Forges custom katas and signature techniques — Apex and LWC of the dojo arsenal.

roles.name: All-Valley Champion - West Coast
roles.description: Reigning champion of the western tournament circuit — sets the standard for senior black belts.

roles.name: Senior Sensei - Okinawa Branch
roles.description: Veteran instructor at the overseas branch dojo — runs advanced classes and mentors juniors.

roles.name: Junior Sensei - Okinawa Branch
roles.description: Up-and-coming instructor at the overseas dojo — teaches kata and conditioning under senior guidance.

roles.name: Tournament Bracket Architect
roles.description: Designs the tournament brackets and inter-dojo communication channels — every seed, every flow.

roles.name: Senior Tournament Coordinator
roles.description: Wires up dojo-to-dojo events under the Architect's plan — referees, scoring, and the registration pipeline.

roles.name: Tournament Coordinator
roles.description: Learns the tournament craft — bracket entries, timing tables, and the paperwork between sanctioning bodies.

roles.name: Sparring Match Inspector
roles.description: Watches every match for fouls and weak technique — finds the flaws before the All-Valley judges do.

roles.name: Banner Captain
roles.description: Owns the dojo's banner, branding, and recruitment campaign — leads all marketing craft.

roles.name: Senior Promoter
roles.description: Strategist of dojo demos and tournament hype — books the gyms, sells the seats.

roles.name: Flyer Crew
roles.description: Carries the campaign to the streets — flyers at the strip mall, posters at the high school, social posts before practice.

roles.name: Strategy Scribe
roles.description: Translates between sensei vision and student reality — documents what was promised and what must be drilled.

roles.name: Master Black Belt - West Coast
roles.description: Senior smith of the West Coast circuit — owns the most demanding katas and reviews every black belt's code.

roles.name: White Belt Recruit
roles.description: Newest member of the dojo — runs drills, takes notes, learns the way.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every dojo's project starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Cobra Kai — Strike First Recruitment Drive
Eagle Fang — Bite Hard Splinter Launch

workstreams.name: Testing at the Sekai Taikai Qualifier

realms.projectName: Silver International — Global Karate Empire Rollout

cobra-kai-original.name: Dojo Doors Open
cobra-kai-original.description: Discovery sign-off — the strip-mall sign goes up: Cobra Kai Never Dies.

cobra-kai-original.name: First Class of Recruits
cobra-kai-original.description: Build kickoff: Miguel and the underdogs take their first lesson.

cobra-kai-original.name: Strike First Demo Day
cobra-kai-original.description: Mid-project gate: public demo at the West Valley fair to draw new students.

cobra-kai-original.name: Coyote Creek Invoice
cobra-kai-original.description: Phase invoice trigger: lake retreat training weekend billed back.

cobra-kai-original.name: All-Valley Title Match
cobra-kai-original.description: Go-Live: Cobra Kai takes the All-Valley championship trophy.

cobra-kai-original.name: Sensei Hand-off
cobra-kai-original.description: Hyper-care close: dojo leadership passed to a new generation.

miyagi-do.name: Open the Garden Gate
miyagi-do.description: Project kickoff: Mr. Miyagi's old dojo reopened in the Encino backyard.

miyagi-do.name: Wax On, Wax Off
miyagi-do.description: Build phase: foundational drills installed and rehearsed.

miyagi-do.name: Paint the Fence Sign-Off
miyagi-do.description: UAT gate: discipline drills accepted by senior students.

miyagi-do.name: Crane Kick on the Beach
miyagi-do.description: Go-Live: signature kata performed at the All-Valley.

miyagi-do.name: Bonsai Trim Hand-off
miyagi-do.description: Hyper-care close: dojo grounds handed to Sam and Robby.

miyagi-do.name: Heritage Invoice
miyagi-do.description: Final invoice: Okinawa branch retainer settled with Chozen.

eagle-fang.name: Bite Hard Manifesto
eagle-fang.description: Discovery: Johnny declares the new dojo at the public park.

eagle-fang.name: Park Practice Launch
eagle-fang.description: Build: outdoor classes in session, no rent required.

eagle-fang.name: Defectors Reviewed
eagle-fang.description: Solution review: Hawk and the others officially welcomed back.

eagle-fang.name: Sekai Taikai Qualifier Win
eagle-fang.description: Go-Live: Eagle Fang qualifies for the world stage.

eagle-fang.name: Eagle Fang Hand-off
eagle-fang.description: Project close: Miguel takes captain's responsibilities.

eagle-fang.name: Eagle Fang Final Invoice
eagle-fang.description: Final invoice from the eagles' nest.

terry-silver-international.name: Penthouse Pitch Meeting
terry-silver-international.description: Kickoff strategy session at Terry Silver's Encino estate.

terry-silver-international.name: Quicksilver Method Reveal
terry-silver-international.description: Discovery: secret training methodology unsealed for the empire.

terry-silver-international.name: Korean Branch Build
terry-silver-international.description: Build: Master Kim's branch dojo absorbed into the network.

terry-silver-international.name: Sekai Taikai Showcase
terry-silver-international.description: UAT acceptance: Silver's dojos take center stage at the world tournament.

terry-silver-international.name: Empire Goes Live
terry-silver-international.description: Go-Live + handoff: global karate franchise officially launched.

terry-silver-international.name: Silver International Invoice
terry-silver-international.description: Final invoice from Silver International — paid in full, no questions asked.

Johnny Lawrence.notes: Coors Banquet refresher and old Iron Eagle marathon.

Miguel Diaz.notes: Family trip to Ecuador to visit his father.

Eli Hawk Moskowitz.notes: Mohawk re-bleach and tattoo touch-up appointment.

John Kreese.notes: Vietnam veterans' reunion — no mercy, no questions.

Daniel LaRusso.notes: LaRusso Auto Group quarterly sales kickoff.

Robby Keene.notes: Volunteering at the youth detention center.

Chozen Toguchi.notes: Okinawa family obligations — annual ancestral rites.

Bert Frasier.notes: Middle school band trip to Sacramento.

Kenny Payne.notes: Visiting older brother on military base.

Terry Silver.notes: Tahiti retreat — meditation and hostile-takeover planning.

Kim Da-Eun.notes: Return to Korea to consult with Master Kim Sun-Yung.

Master Kim Sun-Yung.notes: Annual mountain seclusion — no phones, no students.
